content: Official OSC and MIDI sources plus QLC+ documentation confirm the useful controller primitives: OSC address-pattern messages and timestamped bundles; MIDI Note, Control Change, Program Change and clock/show-control messages; controller learn/profiles, press/release normalization, soft takeover, and state feedback. For GOLC, keyboard and MIDI Note/CC learn are the strongest v1 surface; native OSC can follow the versioned API because a bridge can map OSC onto the same commands.
